summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Admin Panel and SEO Platform. Backend: 24/24 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All admin pages working correctly - login, dashboard, blog management, location management, orders. Public pages working - blog list, location pages, i18n APIs. One minor bug found: Blog post content displays raw HTML tags instead of rendered HTML.

ui_bugs.issue:
Blog content displays raw HTML tags (e.g., '

Discover the best anti-aging tips...

') instead of rendered HTML. Content is being rendered as plain text using paragraph splitting instead of dangerouslySetInnerHTML.
ui_bugs.fix_suggestion: Use dangerouslySetInnerHTML to render HTML content: <div dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: blog.content }} />

action_items: Fix BlogPost.js to render HTML content properly using dangerouslySetInnerHTML instead of plain text splitting
critical_code_review_comments: BlogPost.js line 74-80: Content rendering should use dangerouslySetInnerHTML for HTML content, not paragraph splitting

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all features working, 1 minor content rendering bug)

seed_data_creation: Test blogs and locations created during testing were cleaned up automatically
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Panel fully functional: login with 'celestaglow2024', dashboard shows analytics (18 orders, ₹18,533 revenue, 3 blogs, 1 location). Blog CRUD, Location CRUD, Orders list all working. Public blog list shows 3 published blogs. Location page for /maharashtra/mumbai working. i18n APIs support English and Hindi. One bug: BlogPost.js renders HTML content as plain text.

admin_login.details: Login with password 'celestaglow2024' works, invalid password shows error, redirects to dashboard on success

admin_dashboard.details: Shows 4 stat cards (orders, revenue, blogs, locations), quick actions, top blogs, recent orders table

admin_blog_management.details: List view with search/filter, create new blog, edit blog, publish draft, delete blog - all working

admin_location_management.details: List view with search, create new location, edit location, delete location - all working

admin_orders.details: List view with search/filter (All/Prepaid/COD), order detail modal, stats summary - all working

public_blog_list.details: Shows 3 published blogs with title, date, description, read more link

public_blog_post.details: Page loads but HTML content displays as raw tags instead of rendered HTML

public_location_page.details: /maharashtra/mumbai shows geo-targeted content with benefits and CTA

i18n_api.details: Languages endpoint returns en/hi, translations endpoint returns all keys for both languages
